zh.lifeSummary: 當David Tryon於1672年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德時，他的父親William Tryon27歲，母親Mary Steele20歲。他於1698年8月25日與Hannah Wadhams在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1730年12月23日之前在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德，埋葬在美國康乃狄克州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德維利亞 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当David Tryon于1672年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德时，他的父亲William Tryon27岁，母亲Mary Steele20岁。他于1698年8月25日与Hannah Wadhams在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1730年12月23日之前在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德，埋葬在美国康涅狄格州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德維利亞 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Tryon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lincolnshire, Rutland and Northamptonshire): altered form of Dutch Trion, itself a shortened variant of Tirion, a cognate of Walloon and French Thiry .

History: A Northamptonshire family of this name trace their descent from Peter Trieon (died 1611), who went to England from the Netherlands c. 1562. His son, Moses Tryon, was high sheriff of Northamptonshire in 1624. William Tryon (born 1729 in Surrey, England) was the last provincial governor of NY; he gave his name to Tryon County, the district which took in the Mohawk Valley; after the American Revolution this huge area was split into Montgomery, Fulton, and other counties.

variants.name: Thiry
meanings: Walloon, French (mainly Lorraine and Ardennes), and Luxembourgish: from the personal name Thiry, a regional variant of French Thierry . This surname is also found in Germany and in the Flemish part of Belgium.

nameMeanings.name: David
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the greatest of all the kings of Israel, whose history is recounted with great vividness in the first and second books of Samuel and elsewhere. As a boy he killed the giant Philistine Goliath with his slingshot. As king of Judah, and later of all Israel, he expanded the power of the Israelites and established the security of their kingdom. He was also noted as a poet, many of the Psalms being attributed to him. The Hebrew derivation of the name is uncertain; it is said by some to represent a nursery word meaning ‘darling’. It is a very popular Jewish name, but is almost equally common among Gentiles in the English-speaking world. It is particularly common in Wales and Scotland, having been borne by the patron saint of Wales (  see  Dewi   ) and by two medieval kings of Scotland.

en.lifeSummary: When David Tryon was born in 1672, in Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, his father, William Tryon, was 27 and his mother, Mary Steele, was 20. He married Hannah Wadhams on 25 August 1698, in Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 3 daughters. He died before 23 December 1730, in Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, and was buried in Village Cemetery, Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque David Tryon est né en 1672, à Hartford, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, William Tryon, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Mary Steele, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Hannah Wadhams le 25 août 1698, à Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé avant 23 décembre 1730, à Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, et a été enterré à Village Cemetery, Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als David Tryon 1672 in Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Tryon 27 und seine Mutter Mary Steele 20. Er hat am 25. August 1698 in Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America Hannah Wadhams geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb vor 23. Dezember 1730 in Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Village Cemetery, Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando David Tryon è nato il nel 1672 nel Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, il suo padre, William Tryon, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Mary Steele, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Hannah Wadhams il 25 agosto 1698, nel Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 3 figlie. Morì prima del 23 dicembre 1730, nel Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, e fu sepolto a Village Cemetery, Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: David Tryonが1672年にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ハートフォードで生まれた時，父William Tryonは27歳，母Mary Steeleは20歳であった。1698年8月25日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ハートフォードウエスエルスフィールドでHannah Wadhamsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1730年12月23日以前にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ハートフォードウエスエルスフィールドで死去し，アメリカ合衆国コネチカット州ハートフォードウエスエルスフィールドヴィラッジ セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colo: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 w더스필드
ko.Wethersfield Village Cemetery, Wethersfi: 미국 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 w더스필드 비라지 세멧리

ko.Wethersfield, Hartford, Colony of Connec: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 w더스필드
ko.Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, Bri: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 w더스필드
ko.Glastonbury, Hartford, CT: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 글라스토버이
ko.lifeSummary: David Tryon(이)가 1672년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Tryon(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Steele(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1698년 8월 25일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 w더스필드에서 Hannah Wadhams(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1730년 12월 23일 이전 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 w더스필드에서 사망했으며 미국 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 w더스필드 비라지 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando David Tryon nasceu em 1672, em Hartford, Conecticute, British Colonial America, seu pai, William Tryon, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Mary Steele, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Hannah Wadhams em 25 de agosto de 1698, em Wethersfield, Hartford, Conecticute, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu antes 23 de dezembro de 1730, em Wethersfield, Hartford, Conecticute, British Colonial America, e foi sepultado em Village Cemetery, Wethersfield, Hartford, Conecticute, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.Glastonbury, Hartford, CT: гластонбури, хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Когда David Tryon родился в 1672 г. в местности хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени William Tryon было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Steele, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Hannah Wadhams 25 августа 1698 г. в местности ветирсфиелд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер перед 23 декабрь 1730 г. в местности ветирсфиелд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика и был похоронен в местности вилладж кеметири, ветирсфиелд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando David Tryon nació en 1672, en Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, William Tryon, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Mary Steele, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Hannah Wadhams el 25 de agosto de 1698, en Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió antes de 23 de diciembre de 1730, en Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, y fue sepultado en Village Cemetery, Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, Estados Unidos.
